title: Satire and Parody
description: Reading and writing satire: exaggeration, inversion, deadpan, target selection.
summary_pt_br: Sátira exagera defeitos. Paródia imita estilo. Ferramentas: inversão, tom sério, especificidade, contenção.

scenes.subtitle_en: Reading and writing satire: exaggeration, inversion, deadpan, target selection.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Sátira exagera defeitos. Paródia imita estilo. Ferramentas: inversão, tom sério, especificidade, contenção.

scenes.text_en: Reading and writing satire: exaggeration, inversion, deadpan, target selection. Focus: satire and parody. Satire works by exaggerating what is already true.
scenes.text_pt: Sátira exagera defeitos. Paródia imita estilo. Ferramentas: inversão, tom sério, especificidade, contenção. Foco: satire and parody. Sátira funciona exagerando o que já é verdade.

scenes.title: Satire and Parody
scenes.body_en: Satire exaggerates a flaw to expose it. Parody imitates a style to mock it. Key tools: INVERSION (flip roles), DEADPAN (serious tone), SPECIFICITY (real targets), RESTRAINT (less is more).
scenes.body_pt: Sátira exagera defeitos. Paródia imita estilo. Ferramentas: inversão, tom sério, especificidade, contenção.

examples.en: Satire works by exaggerating what is already true.
examples.pt: Sátira funciona exagerando o que já é verdade.

examples.en: The best parody loves its target a little.
examples.pt: A melhor paródia ama o alvo um pouco.

exercise.question: Complete: "Satire works by ___ what is already true."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Satire works by exaggerating what is already true."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Sátira funciona exagerando o que já é verdade.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
The best parody loves its target a little.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "The best parody loves its target a little."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A melhor paródia ama o alvo um pouco.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Satire and Parody — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre satire and parody. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Our new AI writes better apologies than humans.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Use inversion in a quick joke.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The smartest person in the room stayed quiet.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Try deadpan — say something absurd flatly.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I only drink water from bottled clouds.
turns.pt_hint: Só bebo água de nuvens engarrafadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Productivity podcasts that stress you out.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Close with restraint — less is more.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Genius is knowing which jokes to delete.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Satire is empathy with a scalpel.

scenes.title: The satire workshop
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the four tools of satire. Use at least three satirical terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the comedy writing workshop, Rafa and a friend debated what separates great satire from ordinary mockery.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: Satire works by exaggerating what is already true — never by inventing something false about the target.

paragraphs.speaker: Friend
paragraphs.en: Parody, on the other hand, imitates a style so precisely that the reader laughs at recognition alone.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: Deadpan delivery doubles the punch because the audience has to do half the work themselves to get the joke.

paragraphs.speaker: Friend
paragraphs.en: The best satirists love their targets a little — cruelty without affection rarely lasts past its first reading.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Satire at its sharpest, Rafa concluded, is never entertainment — it is the quietest form of moral clarity.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Satire and Parody". Reading and writing satire: exaggeration, inversion, deadpan, target selection. Satire works by exaggerating what is already true. The best parody loves its target a little. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Satire and Parody". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Satire and Parody".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Satire and Parody".

scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
